description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s).</color>
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and disappears after reducing the enemy team's <color=#28d9ed>Chain Points/Action Points</color> by <color=#28d9ed>1000/100</color> respectively.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>CP</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1000</color>、<color=#28d9ed>AP</color>を<color=#28d9ed>100</color>DOWNさせた後、消える。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 적 팀의 <color=#28d9ed>CP/AP</color>를 각각 <color=#28d9ed>1000/100</color> 감소시킨 뒤 사라집니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并使敌军的<color=#28d9ed>CP/AP</color>各降低<color=#28d9ed>1000/100</color>后消失。

name.jp: ライトニングストーム

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Shocked</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>感電</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>감전</color>을 부여합니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>触电</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect) Increases Priority by <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> at the start of battle.\nIncreases damage dealt to targets inflicted with <color=#28d9ed>debuffs</color>.\nReduces the enemy team's <color=#28d9ed>Chain Points</color> by <color=#28d9ed>50</color> after using a skill.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)戦闘開始時、行動ゲージが<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>UPする。\n<color=#28d9ed>弱体効果</color>のある敵に攻撃時、ダメージがUPする。\nスキル使用後、敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>CP</color>を<color=#28d9ed>50</color>DOWNさせる。
description.kr:
(패시브 효과)
전투 개시 시점에 행동 게이지가 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 증가합니다.
<color=#28d9ed>약화 효과</color> 보유 대상 공격 시 피해량이 증가합니다.
스킬 사용 후 적 팀의 <color=#28d9ed>CP</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>50</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.zh:
(被动效果)
战斗开始时,行动值提升<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>。
攻击附带<color=#28d9ed>弱化效果</color>的目标时,使伤害量提升。
使用技能后,使敌方的<color=#28d9ed>CP</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>50</color>。
